creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating/installing of port dns/bind-tools fails when dns/bind99 (or others) is installed. dns/bind-tools gets installed when net-mgmt/nagios is installed as well as net-mgmt/nagios-plugins and  net-mgmt/nagios-plugins are about to be updated as it happens here. The error message shown is:

===>  Installing for bind-tools-9.9.5_10
===>   Registering installation for bind-tools-9.9.5_10 as automatic
Installing bind-tools-9.9.5_10...pkg-static: bind-tools-9.9.5_10 conflicts with bind99-9.9.5_10 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/dig

How-To-Repeat: Have dns/bind99 installed. Have also  net-mgmt/nagios-plugins installed and updated.
